title: Hoping for the Best as AI Evolves
abstract: The Communications website, https://cacm.acm.org, features more than a dozen bloggers in the BLOG@CACM community. In each issue of Communications , we'll publish selected posts or excerpts. twitter Follow us on Twitter at http://twitter.com/blogCACM https://cacm.acm.org/blogs/blog-cacm Gary Marcus on the systems that "pose a real and imminent threat to the fabric of society."
